programs.title: Mr. Crocodile
programs.desc: Mr. Crocodile and his best friend Daisy cheerfully navigate life with boundless enthusiasm and comical misunderstandings due to his instinctive crocodile logic.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Water Walker; Sea Patrol: Pups Save a Windsurfer
programs.desc: Mayor Humdinger swipes Francois' water-walking shoes and ends up trapped in a pit-like turtle nest; the pups spring into action when a nearby volcano erupts.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Rocket Rescuers; Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: The Golden Lion Mask
programs.desc: Cat-Pack members Wild and Shade team up with the Mighty Pups to stop a runaway rocket; when the Ruff-Ruff Pack swipes a priceless golden lion mask from the museum, Shade and Wild must help the PAW Patrol to retrieve the stolen artifact.

programs.title: Rubble & Crew
programs.sub_title: The Crew Builds a Giant Dam; The Crew Builds a Squirrel-Proof Farm
programs.desc: Rubble & Crew are on the job to save Builder Cove after a rainstorm threatens to flood the town; Rubble and Motor come up with crafty construction solutions to fix Farmer Zoe's squirrel problem before the Farm Fair.

programs.title: Mr. Crocodile
programs.sub_title: Tooth on the Loose; Scaredy Croc
programs.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy; Mr. Crocodile, Daisy, and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programs.title: PAW Patrol
programs.sub_title: Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: The Cat That Roared; Cat Pack/PAW Patrol Rescue: Saving the Safe
programs.desc: Leo and Rory join the PAW Patrol on a visit to the jungle; they end up rescuing a baby monkey; when Mayor Humdinger rebuilds Meow Meow to break into Mayor Goodway's new safe, the Cat Pack joins the PAW Patrol to save the day.
